name: image-redaction-service
description: REST and MCP service for blurring sensitive regions in images using normalized coordinates.

scripts.check: npm run lint && node --check src/index.js && node --check src/server.js && node --check src/config.js && node --check src/packageInfo.js && node --check src/http/validation.js && node --check src/image/errors.js && node --check src/image/sources.js && node --check src/image/blurSensitiveRegions.js && node --check src/mcp/http.js && node --check src/mcp/server.js && node --check src/mcp/stdio.js && node --check src/mcp/toolHandlers.js && node --check src/mcp/toolSchemas.js
